title: IGNITE — Supervisor's Office (Her & Her)
description: Explicit Her & Her peak with role-specific her supervisor said tags.
text:
The office door was locked. The city was seventeen floors below them and neither woman was looking at it.

"On the desk," her supervisor said.

Maya went. The leather was cool against her palms. Clara stood between her thighs, hands already working at the buttons of her blouse.

"You've thought about this," her supervisor said.

"Every night," she said.

"Tell me," her supervisor said.

"I want your hands on me," she said. "I want you to tell me what to do."

"Then listen," her supervisor said. She pushed Maya's skirt up, fingers finding bare skin. "Spread your legs."

Maya did. "...yes," she said.

"Good," her supervisor said. Her mouth was on Maya's neck, then lower, and Maya's breath broke apart in her chest.

"Please," she said.

"Please what," her supervisor said.

"Don't stop," she said.

Clara lifted her head. "Look at me," she said.

Maya looked. Clara's hair was loose for the first time Maya could remember.

"I mean it," she said. "I want all of it."

"Then say it," her supervisor said.

"I want you," she said. "Inside me. Now."

Clara kissed her — slow, claiming — and then her fingers were where Maya needed them, and the sounds Maya made were nothing she would ever put in a footnote.
